## Summary

Describe the documentation or workflow change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Prompt update
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Script update
- [ ] Example/benchmark update

## Checks

- [ ] README references are still accurate
- [ ] PLAYBOOK steps are still accurate
- [ ] Prompt sequence is still consistent
- [ ] No private career data is included
- [ ] Examples remain synthetic (only `examples/` is versioned demo material)
- [ ] Template/CSS paths use `templates/harvard.md` and `templates/resume.css`
